name: Agent Orchestrator MCP
description: Multi-agent task management: create agents, delegate tasks with trust-based routing, coordinate file access, run sprints, and monitor performance.

tools.name: create_agent
tools.description: Create a new agent with a name, role, department, and capabilities.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List all registered agents with their trust levels, task counts, and status.

tools.name: delegate_task
tools.description: Delegate a task to a specific agent or auto-route to the best match

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task as completed (or failed). Updates the agent's trust level

tools.name: acquire_files
tools.description: Acquire file locks for coordinated multi-agent work. Prevents conflicts

tools.name: release_files
tools.description: Release file locks held by an agent after task completion.

tools.name: start_sprint
tools.description: Start a focused sprint with named goals and a time limit. Sprints help

tools.name: complete_sprint
tools.description: Complete a sprint and record which goals were achieved. Returns the

tools.name: get_dashboard
tools.description: Get the full orchestration dashboard: agent count, trust averages,

tools.name: get_task_queue
tools.description: Get the task queue, optionally filtered by status (assigned/completed/failed)
